articles.title: Japan 2026: Steering a Reawakened Economic Giant Through the Narrow Strait
articles.snippet: Japan’s economy in 2026 feels like an ocean liner that has finally left the doldrums. For decades, it drifted in a glassy calm — low growth, near-zero inflation and a policy engine running at full throttle just to keep the ship moving. Now the wind has return…

combined_text:
[0.33] Japan 2026: Steering a Reawakened Economic Giant Through the Narrow Strait
Japan’s economy in 2026 feels like an ocean liner that has finally left the doldrums. For decades, it drifted in a glassy calm — low growth, near-zero inflation and a policy engine running at full throttle just to keep the ship moving. Now the wind has return…
